allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: documentación MCP Oracle y Skill Consultorio

- Guía de instalación de MCP Oracle
- Documentación del Skill Consultorio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Skill Consultorio command for Claude Code

Adds the /consultorio skill that enables querying the Oracle DWH
for appointment and production data at Clinica Foianini.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: add accent-insensitive specialty names

Adds both versions \(with and without accents\) for:
- ECOCARDIOGRAMA/ECOGRAFÍA DOPPLER...
- NUTRICIÓN - TRABAJADORES CAF

This ensures filters work regardless of encoding issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
